mapper.sql: id, template_name, appraisal_cycle, cycle_value, applicable_dept_id, self_weight, self_start_time, self_end_time, supervisor_start_time, supervisor_end_time, publish_start_time, publish_end_time, template_status, description, created_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM appraisal_template WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appraisal_template (template_name, appraisal_cycle, cycle_value, applicable_dept_id, self_weight, self_start_time, self_end_time, supervisor_start_time, supervisor_end_time, publish_start_time, publish_end_time, template_status, description, created_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{appraisalCycle}, #{cycleValue}, #{applicableDeptId}, #{selfWeight}, #{selfStartTime}, #{selfEndTime}, #{supervisorStartTime}, #{supervisorEndTime}, #{publishStartTime}, #{publishEndTime}, #{templateStatus}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE appraisal_template
template_name = #{templateName}, appraisal_cycle = #{appraisalCycle}, cycle_value = #{cycleValue}, applicable_dept_id = #{applicableDeptId}, self_weight = #{selfWeight}, self_start_time = #{selfStartTime}, self_end_time = #{selfEndTime}, supervisor_start_time = #{supervisorStartTime}, supervisor_end_time = #{supervisorEndTime}, publish_start_time = #{publishStartTime}, publish_end_time = #{publishEndTime}, template_status = #{templateStatus}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE appraisal_template SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM appraisal_template WHERE template_status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
